title: Tell The Dear Old Body
content:
'Tell the dear old body
        This day I cannot run,
        For the pots are boiling over
        And the mutton isn't done.'"
meaning:
Louisa May Alcott's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "Tell The Dear Old Body"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
